stemHtml: When on the ground in a hangar, which loads are acting in the skin of a cantilever wing outboard of the wing landing gear?

options.a: Tension in the upper skin, compression in the lower skin.
options.b: Compression in both the upper and the lower skin.
options.c: Tension in both the upper and the lower skin.
options.d: Compression in the upper surface, tension in the lower skin.
